latin: Nuntius arrogans mulieri in caupona dixit: 'ego quodammodo vir magni momenti sum. multi me cognoscunt. domum plenam librorum habeo.'

questions.target: Being important, well-known, and having many books
choices: Being important, well-known, and having many books

translation: An arrogant newsman said to a woman at a bar: 'I am sort of a man of great importance. Many people know me. I have a house full of books.'
